ddls:
CREATE TABLE "battery_types" (
  "battery_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battery type */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model name or type of the battery */,
  "capacity" TEXT /* Capacity of the battery in mAh */,
  "length_mm" INTEGER /* Length of the battery in millimeters */,
  "width_mm" INTEGER /* Width of the battery in millimeters */,
  "thickness_mm" INTEGER /* Thickness of the battery in millimeters */,
  "voltage" TEXT /* Voltage rating of the battery */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional description or notes about the battery */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the battery */,
  "cycle_life" INTEGER /* Expected cycle life of the battery */,
  "temperature_range" TEXT /* Operating temperature range of the battery */,
  "safety_standard" TEXT /* Safety standards the battery meets */,
  "cost" REAL /* Manufacturing cost of the battery type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("battery_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "battery_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the battery type */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of batteries in stock */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the inventory (e.g., warehouse, shelf) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the batteries (e.g., in stock, installed, under maintenance) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level that triggers a reorder */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to order when the stock level is low */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reorder */,
  "next_reorder_date" TEXT /* Predicted next reorder date based on usage trends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_battery_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_type_id") REFERENCES battery_types ("battery_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "battery_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the battery type used in the product */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date the product was produced */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., smartphone, tablet) */,
  "product_series" TEXT /* Series of the product (e.g., X10 series) */,
  "product_version" TEXT /* Version of the product */,
  "battery_count" INTEGER /* Number of batteries used in the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_battery_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_type_id") REFERENCES battery_types ("battery_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_control" (
  "qc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control entry */,
  "battery_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the battery type */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality control test */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was conducted */,
  "certification_status" TEXT /* Certification status (e.g., certified, pending) */,
  "test_details" TEXT /* Detailed results of the test */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was conducted */,
  "test_conducted_by" TEXT /* Person who conducted the test */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_battery_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_type_id") REFERENCES battery_types ("battery_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "reliability_rating" REAL /* Reliability rating of the supplier (0-10) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the supplier */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Average lead time for delivery */,
  "preferred_supplier" INTEGER /* Indicates if the supplier is preferred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batteries" (
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battery unit */,
  "battery_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the battery type */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the battery */,
  "manufacture_date" TEXT /* Date the battery was manufactured */,
  "warranty_expiration" TEXT /* Date the warranty expires */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the battery (e.g., new, used, defective) */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the battery was purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Purchase price of the battery */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Predicted next maintenance date based on usage cycles */,
  "maintenance_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or issues found during maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("battery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batteries_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batteries_battery_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_type_id") REFERENCES battery_types ("battery_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage log entry */,
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the battery unit */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product where the battery is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the battery was installed */,
  "uninstallation_date" TEXT /* Date the battery was uninstalled */,
  "usage_cycles" INTEGER /* Number of usage cycles */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the battery during the usage period (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "installation_location" TEXT /* Location where the battery was installed */,
  "installation_by" TEXT /* Person who installed the battery */,
  "uninstallation_by" TEXT /* Person who uninstalled the battery */,
  "usage_duration" INTEGER /* Total usage duration in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_logs_battery_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_id") REFERENCES batteries ("battery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., inventory manager, product engineer, quality control) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battery being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_battery_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_id") REFERENCES batteries ("battery_id")
)
